reviewReply.comment: Gracias Miguel. Te esperamos cuando quieras

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNsLXVyYnZnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy amable el señor, que nos despacho el combustible,  nos orientó donde podíamos alojarnos, dado que se hizo noche y el tiempo no era bueno para seguir. Nos indicó una cabaña, muy agradable,  su dueña Silvia, también muy atenta.

(Translated by Google)
The gentleman who served us the fuel was very kind and gave us directions to a place to stay, as night had fallen and the weather wasn't good for continuing. He pointed us to a very nice cabin, and its owner, Silvia, was also very helpful.

reviewReply.comment: Graciela. Para eso estamos. Muchas gracias

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNsbXRfWlNnEAE

reviewReply.comment: Hola Claudio. Lamentamos tu demora. Pero hemos bajado considerablemente nuestro tiempo de espera.

reviews.comment:
Los baños están limpios  y el personal del full es muy amable. Un dato a tener en cuenta es que suele haber cola para cargar combustible ya que es una parada recomendable si vas rumbo al norte.

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms are clean and the staff is very friendly. One thing to keep in mind is that there's usually a line to fill up with gas, as this is a recommended stop if you're heading north.

reviewReply.comment: Hola Patricia. Hoy la Cola no supera los 4 o 5 autos. Hemos bajado considerablemente la espera
